comments.author: @stevewhite6588
comments.text: Wondering why the cars drive on the wrong side of the road, the locations and the scenery are all backwards? The entire video is flipped. You will recognize them only if you think backwards. The click bait talking of the Forbidden Isle of Ni'ihau - it's never shown. This is what AI can do for those who seek to monetize the beauty that exists in the world by using words and images without a soul. They are purveyors of chaos, not insightful innovation, creativity or clarity.

comments.author: @ChanelExploreTravel4K
comments.text: Towering sea cliffs, valleys hidden behind walls of volcanic rock, and waves that have spent thousands of kilometers crossing the Pacific before reaching shore. Hawaii feels isolated on a map, yet its landscapes are among the most dramatic on Earth. This video goes far beyond the famous beaches and reveals a side of Hawaii that many visitors never get to see. Absolutely stunning footage from start to finish
